form.formComment: Risky starter who put in a fair effort in easier race last start. Looks well drawn here from the rails and will take some catching if jumps well. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Risky starter who put in a fair effort in easier race last start. Looks well drawn here from the rails and will take some catching if jumps well. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by 0.8 lengths at this track (19.31) beating Golden Blend in a Grade 5 on March 24. Risky starter, has the ability to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by 0.8 lengths at this track (19.31) beating Golden Blend in a Grade 5 on March 24. Risky starter, has the ability to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Rounding the home turn tightened for room and came together.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 22.60 over 400m at this track. Close to the speed and boxed on well at his latest run. In the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 22.60 over 400m at this track. Close to the speed and boxed on well at his latest run. In the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the home straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.96) when sixth over 400m at this track in a Grade 3/4. Starts from box 4 for the first time here. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (22.96) when sixth over 400m at this track in a Grade 3/4. Starts from box 4 for the first time here. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn came together, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Finished fifth last start at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently. Has a squeeze box to navigate and looks tested this line up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished fifth last start at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently. Has a squeeze box to navigate and looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but she does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Has a superb 22.3 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but she does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Has a superb 22.3 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.5 lengths in 19.35, beating Chinese Chariot. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 3/4 on March 31 over 340m at this track behind Little Bit Super beaten 7 lengths (19.67). Other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.5 lengths in 19.35, beating Chinese Chariot. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 3/4 on March 31 over 340m at this track behind Little Bit Super beaten 7 lengths (19.67). Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 5.5 lengths over 340m at this track in a handy (19.29), beating Beautiful Magpie. Can measure up again with the right run.
